problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
